response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation contexts, has no demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, MQTT, REST in embedded systems, or message brokers like Kafka/RabbitMQ, and their recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — not the core C++/STL/concurrent systems required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across multiple languages and domains.
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and tools.
Demonstrated ability to build high-performance, event-driven systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang apps).
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL work; core technical requirement of the role is not evidenced.
No exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus).
Cloud experience is AWS/Node.js, not Azure or on-premises industrial platforms as required.

key_factors.factor: Relevant architecture experience in IoT/industrial automation
